rationale: Educ. Code §21.043 governs PEIMS data access for educator preparation programs. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Sec. 21.043. ACCESS TO PEIMS DATA. (a) The agency shall provide the board with access to data obtained under the Public Education Information Management System (PEIMS).
_note: No conflict. The rule text concerns educator preparation program data access and is unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
